subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! The Sun of Revelation hath appeared and become manifest from the horizon of the heaven of divine knowledge, and the Most Exalted Pen hath been moved to mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم آفتاب ظهور از افق سماء علم الهی ظاهر و مشهود و قلم اعلی بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @presence of; reunion with God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels
